articles.title: HIRING INTERNATIONALLY SHOULDN'T MEAN DROWNING IN ADMIN
LIAR'S VALUATION
articles.summary: Startups often mislead employees by inflating valuation revenue metrics like ARR, which can include non-recurring transactions, obscuring true financial health. Equity offers based on these inflated valuations can mislead potential employees about their potential worth. Before joining startups, scrutinize revenue types, valuation structures, and request full financial transparency to make informed decisions.

articles.title: THE AVERAGE FOUNDER AGES 6 MONTHS EACH YEAR
articles.summary: The average age of founders raising capital increases by six months every year due to AI and B2B industry trends. Older founders dominate AI as they often have PhDs and industry experience. B2B success relies on long-established networks and expertise.

articles.title: A LITTLE BIT UNCOMFORTABLE
articles.summary: Moving into a leadership role means your relationship with fear shifts. You now have to also help others take risks. Even asking simple questions can be a great starting point to encourage the people you are invested in to push themselves. It is important to learn to spot fear in others so you know when to step in to move things forward.

articles.title: WHAT'S NEXT AFTER YOU LOSE SOMEONE'S MONEY
articles.summary: After losing an investor's money, founders should follow up with honest self-assessment and feedback requests to preserve relationships and improve future endeavors. Engaging in open communication with past investors can mitigate misunderstandings, demonstrate growth, and possibly spark interest in new ventures. This proactive approach ensures prior investors can accurately represent the founder to new potential backers, maintaining the founder's reputation.

articles.title: PSSST FOUNDERS... 2026 MEANS NEW REQUIREMENTS FOR BUSINESSES. ARE YOU COVERED TO HEAD INTO THE NEXT YEAR CLEAN?
articles.summary: 🆕 pay transparency laws. 🆕 AI hiring regulations. Same founder workload.

articles.title: ZINC
articles.summary: Buy any product online with an API.

articles.title: QUALGENT
articles.summary: QualGent is an AI-powered QA testing tool that automatically tests iOS and Android apps by understanding app UI and behavior without requiring manual test scripts.

articles.title: OKARA
articles.summary: Okara is a private AI chat tool that lets users switch between 30+ hosted open-source models with search, file analysis, and collaboration features.

articles.title: HOW TO SUCCEED AS A SEQUOIA INVESTOR
articles.summary: Ever wondered how Sequoia actually makes investment decisions? Pat Grady and Alfred Lin - recently named as the firm's new stewards - broke it down on Jack Altman's podcast. They go through their voting system, how they track coverage without fake achievement, why they coach investors to stop being afraid of looking stupid, and how to earn founder trust in year one.

articles.title: THE BIFURCATION IN THE AI MARKET
articles.summary: The AI market has split into two. Enterprises are paying for precision with proprietary models, while consumers are using cheaper open source models for play. Proprietary providers don't need to compete on price because they've won the segment that pays. This is why, despite open source models being significantly cheaper, proprietary providers haven't lost pricing power.

articles.title: WHAT BECOMES VALUABLE WHEN AI MAKES CREATIVE WORK EASY
articles.summary: AI simplifying creative work raises the value of unique personal experiences and insights.

articles.title: THE FASTEST-GROWING SOFTWARE VENDORS OF 2025 JUST DROPPED
articles.summary: The Brex Benchmark of the year breaks down the purchasing patterns of Brex's 35,000+ customers to show which vendors are becoming essential for teams to operate and grow.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY AND NOTEBOOKLM DON'T USE BETTER AI—THEY USE BETTER INTELLIGENCE FLOW ARCHITECTURE
articles.summary: Perplexity and NotebookLM use the same models as everyone else, they just architect the flow of work between human and AI better.

articles.title: STOP LOOKING FOR SALES MAGICIANS
articles.summary: Successful sales hinge on scalable processes and good salespeople supported by strong inbound leads.
